_comment: Copilot AI-docs parity gate. SessionStart injects a heads-up (advisory).
UserPromptSubmit ENFORCES on every prompt: on unresolved divergence it returns
continue=false so the turn halts and the user sees the differences via stopReason
(no dependence on the model relaying it). Escape hatch: include the text
'parity: ignore' in your prompt to allowlist the current differences and proceed
-- so the block can never deadlock. Silent when in parity. Cursor mirror:
